exercises.stem: The Great Wall ___ thousands of years ago.
exercises.analysis: 长城是「被建造」的，需用被动语态。thousands of years ago 表示过去时间，用一般过去时的被动语态 was built。

exercises.stem: English ___ in many countries around the world.
exercises.analysis: 英语是「被说」的，需用被动语态。in many countries 表示一般性事实，用一般现在时的被动语态 is spoken。
含情态动词的被动语态构成：情态动词 + be + done。work 是「被完成」的，用 must be finished。

exercises.stem: Intransitive verbs like happen and disappear can be used in the passive voice.
exercises.analysis: 不及物动词（如 happen、disappear）没有宾语，因此没有被动语态。

segments: The letter ___1___ (write) by my friend yesterday.
exercises.analysis: 第一句用一般过去时被动语态 was written。第二句用一般将来时被动语态 will be built。

exercises.question: 将下列主动语态句子改为被动语态：People speak Chinese in China.
scoringPoints: 正确将宾语 Chinese 变为主语
使用一般现在时被动语态 is spoken
